summary: This is a LEGENDARY-tier trader by ELO with demonstrated accuracy above 60% in Russia_UKR, Iran_ME, and Europe — real geopolitical reading ability exists here. However, the dominant trading behavior is yield-harvesting: repeatedly entering near-certainty positions at 0.96–0.999 to collect small premiums, a strategy that has visibly collapsed in recent resolved history with 15 consecutive losses. The Mamdani cluster (8 separate entries, all lost) is a textbook example of sunk-cost doubling-down. Signal value is MEDIUM overall — DOMAIN_ONLY weight is recommended, with full trust only in Russia_UKR, Iran_ME, and Europe where contested-price entries occur, and explicit exclusion of near-certainty entries regardless of domain.
